rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors
Ensure all AGREE annex blocks are properly closed with '};'
Use only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate annex scope (component type or implementation)
generic_rules: Minimize repairs to only address validator diagnostics
Preserve existing architecture and contracts when possible
Use visible identifiers when available to maintain traceability
Remove invalid clauses rather than adding architecture when references are unresolved
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in 'annex agree {** ... **};' blocks
Use 'eq' for equation declarations and 'const' for constant definitions
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture to fix unresolved references
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not declare invalid AGREE scalar types (e.g., 'integer', 'boolean')
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
